svg.title: InspectIQ AI Agent Architecture v2

svg.text: MCAG Technologies LLC · Google for Startups AI Agents Challenge 2026
4-agent sequential pipeline for Florida home inspection automation · Google Cloud Run + Vertex AI
Google ADK · Gemini via Vertex AI
Coordinates 4 sub-agents in strict sequence · task decomposition · shared session state
FL Statute 468 · DBPR · Wind Mit · Citizens HO-800
Vertex AI — ADC auth (no API keys)
Inspection photo · severity badge · audit badge
4-Point · Wind Mitigation · Full inspection — FL-compliant · insurance-ready
Blue = Capture · Green = Analyze + MCP/RAG · Amber = Report · Purple = Audit (new) · Navy = Orchestration · Dashed = MCP tool call
